author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for slash commands (model/compact/resume/rewind/mcp/hooks/permissions/agents/skills/cost/plan/thinkback/teleport/effort/fast). Body shows partial spec was started. Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research. Phase 2 code work is #554. Per-command Phase 2 implementations tracked under #653 (/rewind), #657 (/teleport stub), #659 (/thinkback), #662 (/fast), #663 (/mcp expansion), #666 (/hooks + /permissions UIs). Owner-level external research.
